overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a high-end shooter game, showing exploration of a coastal military facility built into rocky cliffs. The player moves from a covered concrete area past a crashed jet aircraft, through an open courtyard, along a cliffside path overlooking the ocean, and approaches a building entrance. The environment features brutalist concrete architecture mixed with natural rock formations and vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to open courtyard

events.description: exits concrete overhang into open sunlit courtyard area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward while observing the crashed aircraft on the cliff above

entered.detail: brutalist concrete structure providing partial cover at the starting position
large black aircraft wreckage perched on rocky cliff face
steep rock wall with patches of green vegetation and purple flowers

segments.scene_description: The player begins under a concrete overhang and walks forward into an open courtyard area. A large crashed jet aircraft rests atop the rocky cliff face directly ahead, visible against the blue sky. The environment features brutalist concrete architecture mixed with natural rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete courtyard with military containers

agents.ego_description: moving through the open courtyard toward the cliff edge buildings, passing white containers

entered.detail: stacked white modular containers with warning markings and vents
compact concrete structure with distinctive yellow-tinted window

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the wide-open concrete courtyard, passing white container trailers on the left. The crashed jet remains visible on the right side of the frame as the player approaches a small concrete building with a yellow window. The sky is fully visible and the lighting is bright and direct.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside walkway with ocean view

events.description: moves from open courtyard onto narrow cliffside path with ocean vista

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge path, passing large industrial pipes and traffic cone

entered.detail: low concrete barrier separating path from steep cliff drop to ocean
large cylindrical blue industrial pipes running along the cliff edge
expansive view of blue ocean and horizon beyond the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The player transitions onto a narrow walkway along the cliff edge, with the ocean visible to the right. Large blue industrial pipes run along the path next to an orange traffic cone. The crashed jet is no longer visible as the player faces the open water.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with elevator and caution tape

events.description: turns away from cliff edge and approaches building entrance with elevator
slows and stops near the elevator door, looking around the entrance area

agents.ego_description: approaching the building entrance, examining the elevator and surrounding cliff walls

entered.detail: concrete structure with distinctive red horizontal stripe trim and dark elevator doors
dark metal elevator doors with call button panel on the side
red and white striped barrier tape blocking off stairway entrance
large black aircraft wreckage visible again when looking up at the cliff

segments.scene_description: The player turns away from the ocean and approaches a building entrance featuring an elevator with red trim. Red and white caution tape blocks a stairway entrance. Looking up, the crashed jet is visible again atop the nearby cliff face. The ground transitions to wooden decking near the elevator area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered concrete overhang into an expansive coastal military courtyard and along a precarious cliffside path. It begins by emerging from the shade into a bright, open area where a crashed jet aircraft rests atop a rocky cliff face amidst brutalist architecture. As the camera moves across the wide concrete courtyard, it passes white container trailers and a small building with a yellow window before transitioning onto a narrow walkway. The scene then shifts toward the cliff's edge, where the view opens to the ocean and large blue industrial pipes line the path. Finally, the camera turns away from the water to approach a building entrance with an elevator and red caution tape, with the ground shifting to wooden decking as the crashed jet becomes visible once more atop the nearby heights.
